notes.model: Any OpenClaw model alias: grok, haiku, sonnet, qwen-local, etc.
notes.llm_mode: openclaw (routes through gateway) or xai (direct API, needs XAI_API_KEY)
notes.ingest_interval_minutes: How often the cron runs. Change this, then run: engram/update-cron.sh
notes.max_concurrent_chunks: Parallel API calls per file (higher = faster, more API usage)
